_demo_notice: All cases are fictional. public_safe must be true for any record used in public examples.

records.customer_profile: Mid-sized regional tea chain, ~80 stores, branded mini-program use case.
pain_points: Daily reconciliation done manually in spreadsheets.
Wanted full UI control of the mini-program.
records.solution_summary: Integrated payment via API + SDK while the customer kept their own mini-program UI. Daily reconciliation was delivered to their finance SFTP.
records.outcome: Launched in 7 weeks. Finance reconciliation went from ~3 hours per day to under 10 minutes.

records.customer_profile: Coffee chain, ~200 stores, brand wanted to add pre-order pickup and member top-up wallet.
pain_points: Existing POS but no online ordering.
Member system used phone-number identity already.
Peak-hour throughput at flagship stores was a concern.
records.solution_summary: Mini-program payment via API integration, with member identity reused via phone number, and a load test plan for peak stores before go-live.
records.outcome: Launched on time. Pre-order pickup hit 22% of total orders within 6 weeks of launch.

records.customer_profile: Lifestyle apparel brand evaluating whether to launch a WeChat shop or build custom.
pain_points: Not sure whether their category was allowed.
records.solution_summary: Feasibility advisory determined category was allowed and standard shop covered most needs. Recommended 'integration only' with the existing ERP for inventory.
records.outcome: Customer skipped a six-figure custom build and launched in 3 weeks via standard shop + ERP integration.
